name: AgentTool
description: Spawns autonomous sub-agents that run in isolated conversation contexts with their own system prompts and tool permissions, enabling parallel task decomposition and specialized agent types (coder, reviewer, planner).

name: AskUserQuestionTool
description: Allows the model to explicitly pause and ask the user a question when it needs clarification, surfacing a structured prompt in the terminal rather than guessing.

name: BashTool
description: Executes shell commands in a managed subprocess with timeout enforcement, sandboxing integration, output truncation, and streaming progress updates back to the conversation.

name: BriefTool
description: A synthetic tool that switches the model into a concise response mode, reducing verbosity for the remainder of the conversation when the user prefers terse output.

name: ConfigTool
description: Reads and writes Claude Code configuration values programmatically, giving the model the ability to adjust settings (like output style or model) during a session.

name: EnterPlanModeTool
description: Transitions the session into plan mode where the model outlines steps before executing, restricting the available tool set to read-only operations until the user approves the plan.

name: EnterWorktreeTool
description: Creates or switches to a git worktree for isolated experimentation, letting the model make changes on a separate branch without affecting the user's working directory.

name: ExitPlanModeTool
description: Transitions the session out of plan mode back to normal execution mode, re-enabling the full tool set after the planning phase is complete.

name: ExitWorktreeTool
description: Leaves the current git worktree and returns to the original working directory, optionally merging or discarding the worktree's changes.

name: FileEditTool
description: Performs surgical string-replacement edits on files using an old_string/new_string pattern, with uniqueness validation and optional replace-all semantics for safe, reviewable modifications.

name: FileReadTool
description: Reads file contents with optional line-range selection, supporting text files, images (returned as base64), PDFs (page-range extraction), and Jupyter notebooks.

name: FileWriteTool
description: Writes complete file contents to disk, creating parent directories as needed, with guards against overwriting files that haven't been read first.

name: GlobTool
description: Performs fast file pattern matching across the project using glob syntax, returning sorted results for file discovery without reading file contents.

name: GrepTool
description: Searches file contents using ripgrep-powered regex with support for context lines, file type filtering, glob-based path filtering, and multiple output modes.

name: LSPTool
description: Queries connected Language Server Protocol servers for type definitions, references, diagnostics, and symbol information, giving the model IDE-level code intelligence.

name: ListMcpResourcesTool
description: Lists available resources from connected MCP servers, enabling the model to discover what data sources (files, databases, APIs) are accessible through the MCP protocol.

name: MCPTool
description: A dynamic tool wrapper that forwards invocations to tools provided by connected MCP servers, bridging external tool ecosystems into Claude's native tool interface.

name: McpAuthTool
description: Handles OAuth authentication flows for MCP servers that require credentials, managing token acquisition and storage for authenticated MCP connections.

name: NotebookEditTool
description: Edits Jupyter notebook cells by index, supporting cell content replacement, insertion, and deletion while preserving notebook metadata and structure.

name: PowerShellTool
description: Executes PowerShell commands on Windows systems, providing the Windows-native shell equivalent of BashTool with appropriate encoding and execution policy handling.

name: REPLTool
description: An internal-only tool that executes code in a persistent REPL session (Python, Node, etc.), maintaining state across invocations for iterative development and data exploration.

name: ReadMcpResourceTool
description: Reads the contents of a specific MCP resource by URI, returning the data for the model to process -- the read counterpart to ListMcpResourcesTool.

name: RemoteTriggerTool
description: Creates remote webhook triggers that can start new agent sessions when external events occur, enabling event-driven automation workflows.

name: ScheduleCronTool
description: Manages cron-style scheduled tasks that run agent sessions on a recurring schedule, with sub-tools for creating, listing, and deleting cron entries.

name: SendMessageTool
description: Sends messages to other agents in a multi-agent swarm, enabling inter-agent communication and coordination during parallel task execution.

name: SkillTool
description: Invokes named skills (loaded from SKILL.md files) that inject specialized prompts, tool restrictions, and behavioral instructions into a sub-agent context.

name: SleepTool
description: Pauses the agent for a specified duration, used in proactive/autonomous agent modes where the agent needs to wait for external events or schedule future work.

name: SyntheticOutputTool
description: An invisible tool that forces the model to produce structured output in a specific format, used internally to extract structured data from model responses without user-visible tool calls.

name: TaskCreateTool
description: Creates background tasks (shell commands or agent sessions) that run concurrently with the main conversation, returning a task ID for later status checking.

name: TaskGetTool
description: Retrieves the current status and recent output of a background task by its ID, letting the model check on long-running operations.

name: TaskListTool
description: Lists all active and recently completed background tasks with their statuses, providing an overview of concurrent work.

name: TaskOutputTool
description: Fetches the full accumulated output of a background task, useful for reading complete results after a task finishes.

name: TaskStopTool
description: Terminates a running background task by sending it an abort signal, cleaning up resources and marking the task as killed.

name: TaskUpdateTool
description: Sends a message or instruction to a running background agent task, enabling mid-flight guidance and course correction of autonomous sub-tasks.

name: TeamCreateTool
description: Spawns a persistent teammate agent that runs as an in-process concurrent session, participating in the multi-agent swarm with its own conversation context.

name: TeamDeleteTool
description: Removes a teammate agent from the active swarm, terminating its session and cleaning up its resources.

name: TodoWriteTool
description: Writes and manages a structured TODO list that persists across turns, giving the model a scratchpad for tracking multi-step task progress.

name: ToolSearchTool
description: Searches the deferred tool registry by keyword or name to discover available tools that aren't loaded by default, enabling on-demand tool activation.

name: WebFetchTool
description: Fetches web page content by URL, converting HTML to readable text with optional JavaScript rendering, giving the model access to documentation and web resources.

name: WebSearchTool
description: Performs web searches and returns summarized results, enabling the model to find current information beyond its training data.
